description.content: Starts a new instance of the specified orchestrator function.

item.name: Start orchestration with explicit instance ID

request.name: Start orchestration with explicit instance ID

description.content: Queries the status of multiple orchestration instances.
Sends an event notification to a running orchestration instance.
Sends a one-way operation message to a Durable Entity.

The Azure Durable Functions extension exposes built-in HTTP APIs for managing orchestrations, entities, and task hubs. These HTTP APIs are extensibility webhooks authorized by the Azure Functions host and handled by the Durable Functions extension. Use them to start orchestrations, query status, raise events, terminate, suspend, resume, rewind, signal entities, and purge history.
